stemHtml: During descent, a TA indicates traffic below. The PM advises the PF to level off. Should the PF comply?

options.a: No — a TA only improves situational awareness; no manoeuvre should be based on it.
options.b: Yes — PF should manoeuvre if the traffic is visual.
options.c: Yes — levelling off is standard in this case.
options.d: Yes — PF should manoeuvre based on the TA alone.
